prompt:
Scene:
A square sepia-and-olive prestige poster, lit like aged varnished paper with soft falloff, deep shadows, and a solemn museum-grade finish. The composition should be almost architectural: a central seated figure near the bottom, large areas of quiet negative space above, and a disciplined arrangement of supporting portraits and ceremonial objects around the edges. Keep the palette restrained, tactile, and formal, like a legacy family empire advertisement.

Subject:
Create a cast-remix poster built on the grammar of a revered dynasty drama one-sheet. Replace the expected crime family with an entirely different ensemble: a stern cyberpunk matriarch seated beside an ancestral altar, a pale-haired fantasy tactician standing behind her, a river-merchant daughter in embroidered silk, a scarred mecha veteran holding prayer beads, and a child prodigy with a glowing mechanical dove. Around them, arrange incense smoke, folded fans, lacquered fruit, chess pieces, and a dim wedding banquet corridor. The matriarch must dominate the lower center while all other figures orbit in descending visual importance.

Important details:
The image needs to feel unmistakably poster-authored, with heirloom gravity and classic ad spacing. Preserve the iconic hierarchy of a single seated ruler, surrounding heirs, and ceremonial emptiness above for an abstract title field. Use painterly sepia depth, subtle paper grain, and disciplined symmetry without becoming static. Indicate actor-name bands, critic quotes, and billing-space as elegant horizontal ornaments, carved shapes, or muted plaques that do not resolve into text. The cast swap should feel seamless and intentional, as if a major franchise was reinterpreted by a new studio art department.

Use case:
Iconic Poster Cast Remix single study 2/9, testing whether a classic dynasty-poster composition remains recognizable after a total character-world replacement.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no direct imitation of any real actor portrait, no modern neon clutter, no comedic tone, no random extra faces, no sloppy montage edges, no visible real-world trademarks.
title: Sepia Dynasty Altar
description: A solemn dynasty-poster remix with a seated cyberpunk matriarch, ranked heirs, and ceremonial negative space.

generation.runner_notes: Independent poster-remix study with a sepia dynasty hierarchy and no reference dependency.

en.title: Sepia Dynasty Altar
en.description: A solemn dynasty-poster remix with a seated cyberpunk matriarch, ranked heirs, and ceremonial negative space.
